title: AP RFP — Exclusive Jurisdiction in AP Courts
text_english: The COMPETENT COURTS at ANDHRA PRADESH SHALL HAVE EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION over all DISPUTES arising under, pursuant to, and/or in connection with this Bid Process, this RFP, and the Bids submitted hereunder.

title: AP RFP — Bid Validity 180 Days
text_english: The Bids SHALL REMAIN VALID for a period of {{bid_validity_days}} (default 180) DAYS from the BID DUE DATE. A Bid valid for a SHORTER PERIOD SHALL BE REJECTED by the Authority as being NON-RESPONSIVE. In exceptional circumstances, prior to the expiry of the Bid validity period, the Authority MAY REQUEST Bidders to EXTEND the Bid validity period. A Bidder MAY CHOOSE to ACCEPT or REJECT the Authority's request for extension. If the Bidder agrees to an extension, the EARNEST MONEY DEPOSIT (Bid Security) SHALL ALSO BE EXTENDED for a period equal to the extension. A Bidder who refuses to extend the Bid validity period without forfeiting the EMD shall be deemed to have withdrawn the Bid.
